description_long: This handbag features a structured rectangular body with a fold-over flap closure and a wide central strap that secures the top. The main body is crafted from a smooth, medium-brown leather or leather-like material, complemented by a prominent central panel with a geometric diamond pattern in black and cream. The bag is equipped with a single, adjustable shoulder strap attached with gold-tone hardware, allowing for crossbody or shoulder wear. The sides of the bag are slim, and the base is flat, providing stability when placed on surfaces. The overall design is both functional and stylish, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A medium-brown leather handbag with a geometric patterned panel, fold-over flap, and adjustable shoulder strap with gold hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fold-over flap, central strap, and the full geometric patterned panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, rolled flap, and the attachment of the adjustable strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bag and the continuation of the geometric pattern.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rolled flap and strap attachment from the other side.
attribute_strap_type: Single, long, adjustable shoulder or crossbody strap with gold-tone hardware attachments.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Fold-over flap with a wide central strap; likely secured by a magnetic snap or buckle underneath the flap.
attribute_pattern: Geometric diamond pattern in black and cream on the central panel.
